title: Which platform offers best api?
author: balaji1359
selftext:
Hey folks, 

I am going try custom bot trading, I would like to know which platforms are you guys using to run scripts that executes buy and sell?

Thank you!

comments.author: BuildwithPublic
comments.body: What are you planning on trading? Just simple limit buy sells? Any logic being built in?

replies.author: balaji1359
replies.body:
last year we have developed a platform called finciples.ai. It helps you with buy and sell strategy based on the predominant Investors principles. And it does not execute trade just gives the information.  
  
Now I want use the strategy and  invoke a local bot on my laptop to take a action.
